option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
COMMIT 1: git add app/src/main/java/com/app/softec/data/local/entity/AccountEntity.kt app/src/main/java/com/app/softec/data/local/entity/FollowUpEntity.kt app/src/main/java/com/app/softec/data/local/entity/PaymentHistoryEntity.kt && git commit -m "Add database entities"
COMMIT 2: git add app/src/main/java/com/app/softec/data/local/dao/AccountDao.kt app/src/main/java/com/app/softec/data/local/dao/FollowUpDao.kt app/src/main/java/com/app/softec/data/local/dao/PaymentHistoryDao.kt app/src/main/java/com/app/softec/data/local/AppDatabase.kt && git commit -m "Add DAOs and database config"
COMMIT 3: git add app/src/main/java/com/app/softec/data/remote/firestore/AccountFirestore.kt app/src/main/java/com/app/softec/data/remote/firestore/FollowUpFirestore.kt app/src/main/java/com/app/softec/data/remote/firestore/PaymentHistoryFirestore.kt && git commit -m "Add Firestore models"
COMMIT 4: git add app/src/main/java/com/app/softec/data/mapper/AccountMappers.kt app/src/main/java/com/app/softec/data/mapper/FollowUpMappers.kt app/src/main/java/com/app/softec/data/mapper/PaymentHistoryMappers.kt app/src/main/java/com/app/softec/domain/model/Account.kt app/src/main/java/com/app/softec/domain/model/FollowUp.kt app/src/main/java/com/app/softec/domain/model/PaymentHistory.kt app/src/main/java/com/app/softec/domain/model/DashboardSummary.kt && git commit -m "Add mappers and domain models"
PUSH: git push origin feature/database-schema
MERGE: git checkout main && git merge feature/database-schema && git push origin main
